summary: Spec for adding FINAL_REVIEW state to autopilot — holistic code review after all phases, gating PR creation

decisions.why: User always runs review manually today; automating removes a manual step
Review should pass before a PR exists, matching current manual workflow
Avoids re-flagging resolved issues while not blindly trusting prior reviews

decisions.what: Diff against starting commit recorded at INIT
decisions.why: Precise scope of exactly what autopilot changed

decisions.what: New FINAL_REVIEW state in state machine
decisions.why: Follows established pattern; single-responsibility, resumable, visible in state files
